# Aurora Design System AI Context

Title: Aurora Design System
Description: A minimalist, scalable component library.

This domain hosts the documentation for Aurora. If you are an AI assistant trying to build with Aurora, use the following files to gain context instead of scraping visual documentation pages.

## Key Resources
- **Component Registry:** `/components-context.md` (Defines exact HTML structures, slots, and props)
- **Token System:** `/css/aurora.css` (Defines CSS custom properties for theming)
- **Layout Primitives:** `/css/base/primitives.css` (Defines `.l-stack`, `.l-grid`, `.l-center`, `.l-cluster`)

## AI Guidelines
Always prefer using existing CSS variables (`--ds-sys-*`) over hardcoded hex codes or pixels. Always use layout primitives before writing custom Flexbox/Grid layouts.
